pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor the Maven groupId to reflect the new package namespace.
Update the project properties and compiler settings to target Java 21.
Add Selenium Java dependency for end-to-end UI testing capabilities.
Add WebDriverManager dependency to handle browser driver automation.
Configure the Maven Surefire plugin to set specific system properties for test result directories.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update the logging level configuration to match the new package name after refactoring.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: let historyStack = []; let forwardStack = []; function goToPath(path, pushHistory = true) { ... }

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Replace inline onclick attributes with data attributes and event delegation for cleaner DOM manipulation.
Correctly handle parent directory navigation for Windows drive roots (e.g., C:\).
Replace synchronous directory analysis with Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time progress updates.

Add a comment indicating that browse history functionality is kept internal/hidden.
